text.title: ai-agent-patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ai-agent-patterns as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: ReAct loop without error recovery for failed tool observations.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A wrong observation at step 3 corrupts all subsequent reasoning. The agent compounds errors rather than recovering.
